LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DAVID CARL ANDERSON, DBA LAW OFFICE OF DAVID C. ANDERSON, LOMBARDI, LOPER & CONANT, LLP AND SENTRY INSURANCE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT PLEADS SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT AN AWARD OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES BASED ON THE ALLEGED INTENTIONAL TORTS. THE MOTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENDANTS LOMBARDI, LOPER & CONANT, LLP AND SENTRY INSURANCE AS UNOPPOSED. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT DAVID PIVTORAK'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS TO ALL 8 CAUSES OF ACTION. THE 1ST, 2ND, 4TH, 5TH, 6TH, 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION DO NOT ALLEGE CONDUCT THAT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY UNDER THE STATUTE. AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, THE FILING OF THE NOTICE OF LIEN FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES DOES ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, HOWEVER, CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANDERSON HAS PRODUCED PRIMA FACIE EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALBERT G. STOLL JR., TEL. NO. 762-0039 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN M. SHUGART OF ANDERSON LAW, TEL. NO. 395-9898 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DAVID CARL ANDERSON, DBA LAW OFFICE OF DAVID C. ANDERSON, LOMBARDI, LOPER & CONANT, LLP AND SENTRY INSURANCE'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From First Amended Complaint - The motion is denied as to defendant Anderson. The amended complaint pleads sufficient facts to support an award of punitive damages based on the alleged intentional torts. The motion is granted without leave to amend as to defendants Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP and Sentry Insurance as unopposed. The Request for Judicial Notice is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SPENCER C. YOUNG, TEL. NO. (510) 645-1585 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN SHUGART & ATTY. DAVID C. ANDERSON OF THE ANDERSON LAW, TEL. NO. 395-9898 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT DAVID PIVTORAK'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS TO ALL 8 CAUSES OF ACTION. THE 1ST, 2ND, 4TH, 5TH, 6TH, 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION DO NOT ALLEGE CONDUCT THAT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY UNDER THE STATUTE. AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, THE FILING OF THE NOTICE OF LIEN FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES DOES ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, HOWEVER, CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANDERSON HAS PRODUCED PRIMA FACIE EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/LN
